prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). View of Earth from low orbit at night. The curve of the planet fills the lower third of the frame with city lights glowing in warm amber pinpricks across the dark continents. Above the horizon, deep black space studded with stars. Faint orbital arc lines suggest movement of satellites and the spin of the Earth itself. The atmosphere glows with a thin cyan rim against the void. No people, no spacecraft, no text. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric and contemplative — conveys the idea that everything in the cosmos, including the still-looking Earth, is in constant motion. Dark cosmic background, warm amber accents from city lights, no text overlay.
alt: Earth from space at night with motion-trails of city lights and faint orbital arcs above

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration in dark theme. Foreground: a stylised teenage student in casual Indian clothing sits cross-legged on the rounded curve of Earth, hands folded in their lap, looking calm. Show only a curved slice of Earth at the bottom of the frame. Around the figure, draw bold curved orange motion-arrows: one arrow wraps around the Earth's axis labelled "Earth spins — 1,400 km/h", another sweeping arc labelled "Earth orbits Sun — 30 km/s", a third smaller arrow over the figure's chest labelled "Blood flow — 0.5 m/s". The student appears unaware of the arrows. Dark deep-space background with scattered stars in cool indigo and a faint Milky Way band. Clean digital illustration, slightly stylised but anatomically plausible character, integrated sans-serif labels with thin orange leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and arrows, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A person sitting calmly on Earth, with overlay arrows showing the planet spinning and orbiting the Sun at high speed

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration, split into two panels side by side, both on a dark background. Left panel labelled "View from inside the bus": show a girl seated inside a bus interior, throwing a ball straight up; the ball's trajectory is drawn as a clean vertical orange dashed line going up and back down. Bus interior is dim blue-grey. Right panel labelled "View from the roadside": show the same bus from outside, moving rightward across the frame, with the same ball traced as a clean orange parabolic arc above the bus. A small standing observer on the roadside watches. Stars and a dark night sky in the background of both panels. Clean digital illustration, slightly stylised characters with realistic proportions, sans-serif labels with thin orange leader lines. Composition: 16:9 horizontal split. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and arrows, clean technical illustration style.
alt: Two-panel diagram showing a ball thrown straight up inside a moving bus, traced as a vertical line from the passenger view and a parabola from the roadside view

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A single horizontal number line stretches across the frame, divided into evenly spaced tick marks with labels: -20 m, 0 m (labelled "O" in larger text), 20 m, 40 m, 60 m, 80 m, 100 m. Above the rightmost tick (100 m), a stylised teenage female athlete in a sports kit is shown mid-stride running rightward. Above the line at the right end, a bold orange arrow points right with a "+" sign. At the left end, a smaller orange arrow points left with a "−" sign. The line itself is rendered in soft white. Number labels in clean sans-serif. Dark night-sky background with subtle stars. Clean digital illustration, slightly stylised character with realistic proportions, sans-serif labels with thin leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and arrows, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A horizontal number line marked with positions from -20 m to 100 m, origin labelled O, with an athlete figure standing at 100 m and arrows showing positive and negative directions

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A young Indian athlete running along a curving stadium track at deep twilight, captured from a low elevated angle. The track curves to the right and then doubles back. A glowing red dashed trail follows every step of her path along the track (showing distance travelled). Overlaid on top, a single bold green straight arrow connects her starting position to her final position, much shorter than the red trail (showing displacement). Stadium lights barely glow in the misty distance, dark indigo sky with a few stars. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric and contemplative. Dark background, warm rim-lighting on the runner, no text overlay.
alt: A runner on a dark twilight track with red dashed trail showing the path travelled and a green straight arrow showing net displacement

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A horizontal number line stretches across the frame with tick marks labelled 0 m (at origin O on the left), 20 m, 40 m (point B), 60 m, 80 m, 100 m (point A on the right). A stylised teenage Indian female athlete in a red sports kit is shown at point B, mid-stride, having just turned around. Above the number line, a thick red dashed arrow path traces from O all the way right to A and then back to B, with the label "Total distance travelled = 160 m". Below the number line, a single bold green solid arrow goes straight from O to B, labelled "Displacement = 40 m". A small "+" sign at the right end of the line and a "−" at the left end indicate sign convention. Dark night-sky backdrop with subtle stars. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and warm-red and green accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: Number line showing Neena starting at O, running to point A at 100 m, and returning to point B at 40 m, with a red trail above showing total distance 160 m and a green arrow below showing displacement 40 m

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A young Indian student stands in the bottom centre of the frame with their right hand extended upward, having just thrown a ball straight up. The ball is shown at three positions stacked vertically along a single thin orange dashed vertical line: at the hand (labelled "Start: 0 m"), at the apex high above (labelled "Top: 1.4 m"), and falling back down (labelled "Returned: 0 m"). Two curved arrows along the dashed line: one orange arrow going up labelled "Distance up = 1.4 m", one orange arrow going down labelled "Distance down = 1.4 m". To the right of the figure, a summary box with two lines of text: "Total distance = 2.8 m" and "Displacement = 0 m". Dark night-sky backdrop. Clean digital illustration, slightly stylised character with realistic proportions, integrated sans-serif labels. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and arrows, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A ball thrown vertically upward from a hand, rising to a peak and falling back, with the path traced as a vertical line and arrows showing 1.4 m up and 1.4 m down

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A glowing analog speedometer dial floating in deep dark space, illuminated from within with warm orange light, the needle frozen at "60". Behind the dial, a long bold directional arrow streaks outward to the upper right, made of glowing orange particles, suggesting the missing dimension of direction that turns speed into velocity. Subtle motion lines and faint stars in the deep indigo background. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric. Dark background, glowing orange instrument-light accents, no text overlay.
alt: A glowing speedometer dial floating in a dark space with a directional arrow shooting outward from its centre, suggesting that magnitude alone is incomplete without direction

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. Top-down view of a rectangular swimming pool with clear blue water, lane lines in white, the long edge labelled "25 m" in clean sans-serif. A stylised teenage Indian male swimmer is shown at the near end. A bold orange arrow traces his path: it goes from the near end straight to the far end, then loops at the far end and comes back to the near end — visualising the round trip. To the right of the pool, a clean text panel: "Total distance = 50 m", and below it: "Displacement = 0 m". The pool is set into a dark stone deck with subtle ambient lighting suggesting evening. Slightly stylised character with realistic proportions. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and arrows, clean technical illustration style.
alt: 25 m swimming pool seen from above with a swimmer at one end, an arrow tracing his swim to the far end and back, with side labels for distance and displacement

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A modern Indian sedan on a dark wet highway at night, photographed from a low angle behind it. The car's brake lights are blazing red, casting glowing reflections on the wet road. Long horizontal motion-blur streaks behind the wheels suggest the car is decelerating hard. The road and surrounding landscape are shrouded in atmospheric mist; faint silhouettes of distant trees and a single yellow streetlight in the deep background. Painterly cinematic illustration, dramatic lighting, contemplative mood — conveys the moment velocity is changing. Dark background, glowing red and warm amber accents, no text overlay.
alt: A car at night with bright red glowing brake lights and motion blur, conveying sudden deceleration

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration, split into two panels side by side, both on a dark background. Both panels show the same Indian sedan car driving rightward across an unlit highway at night. Left panel labelled "Speeding up": below the car, two horizontal arrows of equal direction — a longer thin green arrow labelled "velocity" pointing right, and beneath it a slightly shorter bold orange arrow labelled "acceleration" also pointing right. Right panel labelled "Slowing down": same car, again moving rightward — a green velocity arrow pointing right, but the orange acceleration arrow pointing left, opposite to the motion. The car in the right panel has bright red brake lights visible from behind. Dark night sky with subtle stars. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and green accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: Two side-by-side car illustrations: one accelerating with velocity and acceleration arrows pointing the same way, one braking with velocity and acceleration arrows pointing opposite ways

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A glowing red apple falling through deep dark space, captured as a strobe-multi-exposure with the apple appearing at five positions stacked top-to-bottom — but each gap between successive apples is larger than the one above. Subtle vertical orange dashed line connects the positions, marking the path. The deepest gap is at the bottom, just above an unseen ground. Faint stars and a deep indigo cosmic background. Painterly cinematic illustration, dramatic — captures the visual signature of constant acceleration: equal time intervals, growing distances. Dark background, glowing warm red and amber accents, no text overlay.
alt: A red apple falling through dark space, captured as a strobe sequence with the ball appearing at five positions, each gap larger than the last

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A single vertical column on the right side of the frame shows a small dark-red ball at five positions stacked top-to-bottom along a thin orange dashed vertical line. The positions correspond to t = 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 seconds. The vertical gaps between successive positions GROW: small gap at top, increasingly larger gaps below. Beside each ball position, label in clean sans-serif: "t = 0 s, v = 0 m/s", "t = 1 s, v = 9.8 m/s", "t = 2 s, v = 19.6 m/s", "t = 3 s, v = 29.4 m/s", "t = 4 s, v = 39.2 m/s". A vertical scale on the left shows distance markers from 0 m at top to 80 m at bottom. Subtle starry dark cosmic background. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin orange leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and warm-red accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A vertical strip showing a ball at 5 positions during free fall, with each position marked by time and velocity, and increasing distances between successive positions

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A luminous line graph floating in deep dark space — clean orange line plotted on a soft white grid, the line rising from bottom-left to upper-right at a steady angle. At each tick along the line, a glowing star-like dot pulses gently, suggesting that each point is a measured moment. Behind and around the graph, an even darker indigo void scattered with faint distant stars. The graph appears to almost be its own constellation. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric and contemplative — conveys that motion can be drawn as a picture. Dark background, glowing orange and warm-white accents, no text overlay.
alt: A glowing line graph floating in dark space showing position rising over time, with constellation-like dots marking each measurement
